settings.heading: Curating the Extraordinary
settings.subheading: Bespoke Elegance. Born in Cape Town.
settings.body: A regal house of black and gold, built to hold something far less quiet — bold, playful, colour-drenched socks and apparel. Kingsdale Emporio is that tension, made deliberate: strict luxury on the outside, real character within.

settings.title: Signature Socks
settings.description: Bold colourways and premium yarns — the collection Kingsdale was built on.

settings.title: Custom Apparel
settings.description: A curated portfolio of lifestyle pieces, made to the same exacting standard.

settings.title: Corporate Gifting
settings.description: Branded socks for events, onboarding and clients who deserve better swag.

settings.heading: Three Houses, One Standard
settings.subheading: From the sock that started it all to gifting your clients will actually keep — every line carries the same finish.

settings.heading: Africana Heritage Collection
settings.subheading: The house is black and gold — strict, regal, quiet. What it holds is not. Heritage Red, Vibrant Ochre, Cerulean Blue, Emerald Green: four colourways, one philosophy.

settings.heading: See Your Initials, Before You Order.
settings.body: Every corporate gifting order starts here. Type the initials or monogram you'd like woven into your pair, preview it in gold, then send your brief straight through to our studio on WhatsApp.

settings.milestone: Kingsdale Emporio founded in Cape Town

settings.point: Minimum orders suited to small and large teams

settings.heading: Gifting Your Clients Will Actually Keep On.
settings.body: We work with businesses across South Africa on branded socks and apparel for events, onboarding kits and executive gifting — designed, sampled and delivered without the back-and-forth.
settings.whatsapp_message: Hello Kingsdale Emporio! I am reaching out from your website and would like more information on corporate gifting.

settings.quote: Ordered branded socks for our whole team's onboarding kit. The finish made a R500 gift feel like a R2000 one.
The monogram on my pair is a better conversation starter than my watch. That's saying something.
Sampled, briefed and delivered for a 200-person conference in under three weeks. No drama, just quality.

settings.heading: Inner Circle
settings.body: Exclusive offers, early access to new colourways, and first word on limited corporate-gifting slots — straight to your inbox.
settings.modal_body: Thank you for subscribing. Expect early access to new colourways and first word on limited corporate-gifting slots, straight to your inbox.
